title: selaginella gracilis
intro: Selaginella gracilis, also known as the slender spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella gracilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
